sections.title: Comprehensive State Regulatory Matrix
sections.description: Complete comparison matrix of all states covered in Course 4

regulatory_authorities.nevada: Radiation Control Program, Division of Public and Behavioral Health
regulatory_authorities.new-york: NYS Department of Labor, Radiological Health Unit
regulatory_authorities.texas: Department of State Health Services, Radiation Safety Licensing Branch
regulatory_authorities.washington: Department of Health, X-Ray Control / Radiation Protection

special_provisions.massachusetts: $500 max civil penalty, waiver provisions, 15-day vendor notification
special_provisions.new-york: Class A/Class B certification, multiple training providers
special_provisions.texas: ILDA engagement, laser hair removal provisions, IPL regulations

sections.title: I'm Touring - What Do I Need?
sections.description: Interactive decision tree for touring laser show operators

steps.question: What type of operation are you planning?
Which states are you touring through?
Which state is your event in?

questions.question: Do you have a current FDA variance for your laser equipment?
questions.if_no: You must obtain FDA variance before operating in ANY state

questions.question: Are you planning to operate in New York?
questions.if_yes: Class A or Class B operator certification required

questions.question: Will any shows be outdoors with beams entering airspace?
Are you touring with Class 3B or Class 4 lasers?
questions.if_yes: Registration required in IL, MA, NY, TX

nevada.note: Contact Radiation Control Program - specific days not defined

practices.description: If touring multiple states, comply with the most restrictive state's requirements as your baseline
Maintain all state registrations, notifications, and compliance documents in a central accessible location
practices.rationale: Quick access during inspections, prevents lost paperwork

practices.description: Submit notifications 25% earlier than required minimums
practices.rationale: Accounts for processing delays, weekends, holidays

practices.description: Map your LSO's qualifications against all states' requirements
practices.rationale: Illinois requires 9 specific areas - ensure coverage

practices.description: If purchasing equipment across state lines, understand vendor notification requirements (MA: 15 days)
practices.rationale: Prevents compliance gaps during equipment acquisition

practices.description: Prepare a mobile inspection kit with all required documentation

scenarios.title: The Cross-Country Tour
scenarios.context: You're planning a 10-city tour hitting all six states in this module over 3 months.
scenarios.challenge: Manage varying compliance requirements while maintaining tour schedule.
key_decisions: Which state registrations to obtain first?
How to manage NY training requirement?
solution_highlights: Obtain NY Class B certification first (most restrictive training)
Submit notifications for inspection states (NY, TX) earliest
Build 2-week buffer into tour schedule for compliance activities

scenarios.title: The Emergency Replacement
scenarios.context: A laser fails 2 days before a show in Massachusetts. You need to bring in replacement equipment from out of state.
scenarios.challenge: 10-day advance notice requirement but show is in 2 days.
solution_highlights: Contact MA Radiation Control Program immediately
Reference waiver provision (105 CMR 121.011) for undue hardship
Demonstrate substantial compliance with spirit of requirement

scenarios.title: The New Operator
scenarios.context: You're hiring a new laser operator who will work in both notification-only and comprehensive states.
scenarios.challenge: Ensure operator is qualified for all jurisdictions.
solution_highlights: Obtain NY Class B certification (covers most training requirements)
Document training in all 9 Illinois LSO qualification areas
Maintain training records per longest retention requirement (IL: 5 years)

questions.question: Which states require 10 working days advance notice for entertainment laser shows?
options: Illinois, Massachusetts, and New York only
questions.explanation: Illinois and Massachusetts specifically require 10 working days advance notice. Nevada and Washington require advance notification but don't specify exact days. New York and Texas have comprehensive registration requirements.

questions.question: A touring show needs to comply with the most restrictive requirements across all states. Which state sets the baseline for operator training?
questions.explanation: New York's Class A/Class B certification requirement is the most specific training mandate. While Illinois requires 9 qualification areas, New York mandates formal certification from approved providers.

questions.question: For a multi-state tour including NV, WA, NY, and TX, which two states will conduct routine inspections?
questions.explanation: New York and Texas conduct routine inspections. Nevada and Washington are notification-only states without routine inspection programs.

questions.question: You're planning a show in Boston in 8 days. Massachusetts requires 10 working days notice. What should you do?
options: Proceed without notification and hope for no inspection
Contact MA Radiation Control Program immediately and request waiver consideration
questions.explanation: Massachusetts 105 CMR 121.011 allows the Commissioner to waive requirements for undue hardship with substantial compliance and no health/safety jeopardy. Contact them immediately with written documentation.
